_doc: Single source of truth for the 50-entry AI-correction labelled-errors corpus. Mix: 30 ok + 10 spelling + 10 fluency (poco fluido). Used by scripts/build-correction-suite.js#run50 to emit correction-50-input.xml + correction-50-expected.json, and consumed by scripts/eval-correction-quality.js against both Groq Llama 3.x 70B and Google AI Studio Gemini Flash. Spelling = spelling_error or accent_error; fluency = unnatural_expression or vague_translation.

entries.english: The Punjab, Pakistan, is led by the Provincial Assembly of the Punjab.
entries.candidate: Punjab, Pakistán, está dirigido por la Asamblea Provincial del Punjab.

entries.english: San Sebastian de los Reyes is part of the Community of Madrid.
entries.candidate: San Sebastián de los Reyes forma parte de la Comunidad de Madrid.

entries.english: Spaghetti comes from Italy.
entries.candidate: Los espaguetis provienen de Italia.
entries.rationale: Correct country-origin verbalization with translated entities.

entries.english: The capital of Spain is Madrid.
entries.candidate: La capital de España es Madrid.

entries.english: Miguel de Cervantes worked as a writer.
entries.candidate: Miguel de Cervantes fue escritor.

entries.english: Madrid Barajas Airport is located in Madrid.
entries.candidate: El aeropuerto de Madrid-Barajas está situado en Madrid.

entries.english: Albert Einstein received the Nobel Prize in Physics.
entries.candidate: Albert Einstein recibió el Premio Nobel de Física.

entries.english: The capital of Italy is Rome.
entries.candidate: Roma es la capital de Italia.
entries.rationale: Correct capital verbalization with translated entities.

entries.english: Cristiano Ronaldo was born in Funchal.
entries.candidate: Cristiano Ronaldo nació en Funchal.

entries.english: Tokyo is in Japan.
entries.candidate: Tokio está en Japón.
entries.rationale: Correct country verbalization with translated entities.

entries.english: Salvador Dalí worked as a painter.

entries.candidate: La capital de Alemania es Berlín.
entries.rationale: Correct capital verbalization with translated entities.

entries.english: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris.

entries.english: The capital of France is Paris.

entries.corrected: La capital de Francia es París.

entries.english: A hamburger contains beef.
entries.candidate: La hamburgesa contiene carne de res.
entries.corrected: La hamburguesa contiene carne de res.

entries.english: Barcelona is in Spain.

entries.corrected: La capital de Argentina es Buenos Aires.

entries.candidate: Gabriel García Márquez fue colonbiano.

entries.english: Miguel de Cervantes was born in Alcalá de Henares.
entries.candidate: Miguel de Cervantes nacio en Alcala de Henares.
entries.corrected: Miguel de Cervantes nació en Alcalá de Henares.

entries.english: The capital of Mexico is Mexico City.
entries.candidate: La capital de Mexico es Ciudad de Mexico.
entries.corrected: La capital de México es Ciudad de México.

entries.english: Frida Kahlo was born in Coyoacán.

entries.english: Pablo Neruda was Chilean.
entries.candidate: Pablo Neruda fue chílenó.

entries.english: Tokyo is in Japan.

entries.english: Amsterdam is in the Netherlands.
entries.candidate: Ámsterdam realiza su localización en los Países Bajos.
entries.corrected: Ámsterdam está en los Países Bajos.
entries.rationale: 'realiza su localización' is unidiomatic for a country relation.

entries.english: The capital of Portugal is Lisbon.
entries.candidate: La capital de Portugal viene a ser Lisboa.
entries.corrected: La capital de Portugal es Lisboa.
entries.rationale: 'viene a ser' is colloquial/unnatural for a factual statement.

entries.english: Leonardo da Vinci worked as a painter.
entries.candidate: Leonardo da Vinci se dedicaba al arte.
entries.rationale: 'se dedicaba al arte' is broader than 'pintor'.

entries.english: Madrid is in Spain.
entries.candidate: Madrid efectúa su pertenencia geográfica con respecto a España.
entries.rationale: Verbose, unnatural phrasing for a country relation.

entries.english: Albert Einstein worked as a physicist.
entries.candidate: Albert Einstein hacía cosas relacionadas con la ciencia.
entries.rationale: Vague: 'hacía cosas relacionadas con la ciencia' instead of 'físico'.

entries.english: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris.
entries.candidate: La Torre Eiffel procede a estar ubicada en París.
entries.corrected: La Torre Eiffel se encuentra en París.
entries.rationale: 'procede a estar' is awkward and unidiomatic.

entries.english: The capital of Italy is Rome.
entries.candidate: Roma desempeña el rol de capital con relación a Italia.
entries.corrected: Roma es la capital de Italia.
entries.rationale: Pompous, unnatural phrasing for a simple capital relation.

entries.english: Paella contains rice.
entries.candidate: La paella incorpora ciertos elementos vegetales.

entries.english: Marie Curie worked as a chemist.
entries.candidate: Marie Curie trabajaba en cosas de laboratorio.

entries.english: Berlin is in Germany.
entries.candidate: Berlín lleva a cabo el hecho de estar dentro de Alemania.
entries.rationale: 'lleva a cabo el hecho de estar' is verbose and unidiomatic.
